title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 174.105 - Attendance policy for members of governing boards
text:
174.105.  Attendance policy for members of governing boards. — Each governing board of the four-year institutions defined in section 176.010 shall adopt an individual attendance policy for the members of its board, by August 28, 1996, and in compliance with subsection 3 of section 172.070.  If an attendance policy is not adopted, the coordinating board for higher education shall establish an attendance policy for the governing board by January 1, 1997.
(L. 1996 H.B. 980 § 1)
